name: ruby3.3
title: ruby3.3
summary: Interpreter of object-oriented scripting language Ruby
description:
Interpreter of object-oriented scripting language Ruby
Ruby is the interpreted scripting language for quick and easy
object-oriented programming.  It has many features to process text
files and to do system management tasks (as in perl).  It is simple,
straight-forward, and extensible.
.
In the name of this package, `3.3' indicates the Ruby library compatibility
version. This package currently provides the `3.3.x' branch of Ruby.

commands.name: gem3.3
commands.description: frontend to RubyGems, the Ruby package manager

commands.name: rdoc3.3
commands.description: Generate documentation from Ruby script files

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use bundle3.3 because Interpreter of object-oriented scripting language Ruby.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use bundle3.3 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `bundle3.3 [options] [args]` as documented upstream for bundle3.3.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair bundle3.3 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `bundle3.3 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
